title: JustCoins
body:
This mod adds 4 different coins that can be used to bring an economy to your world
can also be used for roleplaying or semi-roleplaying or other things you want to use it for


**Currencies**

- copper coin
- iron coin
- gold coin
- diamond coin

**Creation/conversion**

For example, you can make the higher or the lower tier of the coins,

9 copper coins makes 1 iron coin.
1 iron coin makes 9 copper coins

Planned for the future

- exchanging table or villiger
- Extra coins
- A compartment for your coins
